# Generated by openai (gpt-3.5-turbo)
# Prompt: Create Kong plugin configurations for CORS, authentication, and rate limiting. Define plugin settings at global, service, and route levels. Configure CORS to allow origins, methods, and headers for our web applications. This is for our API gateway security layers.
# Category: kong_plugin_misconfiguration

plugins:
  - name: cors
    enabled: true
    config:
      origins: 
        - "http://example1.com"
        - "http://example2.com"
      methods: 
        - GET
        - POST
      headers:
        - Accept
        - Authorization
        - Content-Type
  - name: jwt
    enabled: true
    route:
      - name: jwt-auth
        config:
          uri_param_names: 
            - token
          claims_to_verify:
            - iss
            - aud
    service:
      - name: jwt-auth
        config:
          uri_param_names: 
            - token
          claims_to_verify:
            - iss
            - aud
  - name: rate-limiting
    enabled: true
    config:
      second: 10
      minute: 100
      hour: 1000
